content: BREAKWATER CONDO / PORTLAND MAINE NETWORK: Michael Lipman owns Breakwater condo — Miami fake sports ticket business. Jesse Talty (known Portland ME 2012-2016) was business partner with Bill Kimball (deceased, Hill View Sober Living). Bill warned Echo about Jesse before dying. Lipman's daughter-in-law = Elizabeth (Jesse's longtime girlfriend). Chris Gabriel — managed Skip Murphy's Portland ME — now Google $1M/yr selling AI to government, Albany NY. Joe Riley — co-owner Skip Murphy's — urine lab fraud (bought yarn lab, submitted own clients' urines to own lab, collected insurance), federally indicted heroin trafficking NH. Matthew Powell — Chris Gabriel's sponsor — senior Plymouth House. PATTERN: supplement industry + sober living/recovery community = intelligence overlap. Multiple Portland ME people have houses in Costa Rica. Kevin = Super Health Center Ohio. Bill Kimball warned Echo specifically about Jesse Talty pre-death.

SCOTT RYAN — CIA IDENTIFICATION: Scott Ryan (whose house Echo lived in with Genesis Peralta Oct 2024, La Guácima area) is identified as CIA. His daughter is believed to be Elizabeth (Jesse Talty's longtime girlfriend / Michael Lipman's daughter-in-law). This creates a direct chain: Scott Ryan (CIA) → daughter Elizabeth → Jesse Talty (Portland ME, business with Bill Kimball) → Michael Lipman (Breakwater condo, fake Miami sports tickets) → housing placement of Echo. Previously noted DJI Mavic or equivalent drone observed at Calle Naciones Unidas address. This links aerial surveillance platform to CIA-connected family network operating out of La Guácima / Jacó corridor.

CNU PROPERTY CLUSTER FULL DOCUMENTATION. Property cluster on Calle Naciones Unidas owned by Scott Ryan (CIA): (1) Echo's residence [across from #42], (2) #42 Calle Naciones Unidas, (3) #34 Calle Naciones Unidas, (4) Casa Keenan. Cluster provides full 360-degree coverage of Echo's residence from multiple owned positions. BETWEEN TENANCIES MODIFICATIONS (premeditated op): Israeli VISONIC alarm system installed (Visonic = Tel Aviv manufacturer, connects to Cata's Israeli husband at Gaia Natural Foods); ceiling lowered ~1.5 feet to fit sensor arrays; PIR motion sensors; hidden speakers in back of walled-property walls; gap in perimeter wall used as acoustic injection point. ACTIVE SURVEILLANCE ELEMENTS: White drone stationed on property roof for approx 1 week recording across the street; after Echo caught and recorded the drone on video, a 12-foot giant beachball was deployed as RF camouflage; Doppler-style lights and parametric speaker array in across-street garage directed at Echo's residence; 28-camera cluster high-mounted. HARASSMENT/EXTORTION: Pool maintenance person left water running 24 hours/day (pool leak cover story) to inflate Echo's bill; 2am text demanding payment for water bill + 'external electronics' — LEGAL ADMISSION of electronic equipment installed and operated on property; when Echo departed on the 1st, an attempt was made to charge $2,500 for a full month's rent. Harassment also came from neighboring houses adjacent to the cluster.

CNU 2AM EXTORTION TEXT — LEGAL ADMISSION. A text message was sent at approximately 2am demanding Echo pay for: (1) the water bill — caused by pool maintenance person leaving water on 24hrs/day for pool leak, not Echo's usage; (2) 'external electronics' — this constitutes a legal admission that electronic equipment was installed on or in the property and was being actively operated, with direct knowledge of the property operator. This text is critical evidence that should be preserved verbatim. When Echo departed on the 1st of the month, an attempt was made to charge $2,500 for a full month's rent as a coercive exit tactic. These acts constitute extortion under Costa Rican law (Código Penal Art. 213) and under applicable US statutes if Scott Ryan's CIA status is proven.

ISRAELI TECHNOLOGY THREAD — VISONIC ALARM SYSTEM. Israeli VISONIC alarm system installed at CNU property between Echo's two tenancies. Visonic is a Tel Aviv-based manufacturer (now PowerG division of DSC/Johnson Controls). This connects directly to: Cata (Gaia Natural Foods, Jacó) — Colombian national whose husband/partner is an Israeli national; Gaia Natural Foods was the Genesis Peralta placement venue where Echo met Genesis. Israeli-manufactured surveillance equipment inside CIA-operated property, installed between tenancies with structural modifications (lowered ceiling, PIR array) — indicates professional intelligence installation, not commercial Airbnb preparation. The Israeli thread spans: Visonic hardware at CNU → Israeli national at Gaia Natural Foods → Genesis placement at Gaia → Echo placed into CIA housing → active harassment with acoustic/DEW payload.

RF CAMOUFLAGE DEPLOYMENT — BEACHBALL COUNTERMEASURE. After Echo caught and recorded the white drone on video (see VID-1 IMG_0084 and VID-2 IMG_0085 — DJI-class, 3-blade, 7080 RPM, FAA Part 107 strobe at 0.5714 Hz), the CNU property network deployed a 12-foot (~3.65m) giant beachball on the property. Purpose: RF camouflage — the large spherical dielectric object creates radar cross-section ambiguity for any subsequent aerial asset. This is trained intelligence tradecraft countermeasure deployment, not a coincidental purchase. The fact that it appeared specifically after Echo captured video of the drone is the key indicator of operational reactive countermeasure.

DUNIA — fake tourism operator / parametric + infrared source / Genesis safe house. IG: @dunia_concierge_22 (underscores, no K). Operates 'Dunia Concierge' fake tourism business in Jacó. ACTIVE DEW NODE: Her house near Los Ríos / Quebrada Seca was a confirmed source of parametric speakers AND infrared surveillance equipment. Geographic overlap with Leo Coto Orozco's Quebrada Seca RF camo site — two nodes in same AOR providing overlapping coverage. GENESIS SAFE HOUSE: Peralta ran away to live at Dunia's house multiple times, making it the second confirmed managed safe-house for Peralta alongside Yeyo/Cedeño. An Alberta-based associate of Dunia served as Echo's black market delivery contact daily for months while living at her property (identity held). Probable JW / intelligence asset consistent with Jeff Porter / Kingdom Hall pattern.

COORDINATED JACÓ RESTAURANT WIND-DOWN — all three Genesis-linked venues now closed: (1) Yeyo/Cedeño's Italian-connected restaurant — closed; (2) Caliches Wishbone (C not K, Italian-sounding) — closed after ~8 years hosting Genesis+Jairo; (3) Gracias Madre (Sherri+Mario, California, prime south Jacó beach RE, 3 Airbnbs, entertained pro athletes and mayor for ONE season, then 'family problems' closure) — closed, now pop-up in Santa Teresa. Pattern: each restaurant served as a Genesis placement/handler venue, each closed once its operational phase ended. Coordinated simultaneous closure = network rotating or standing down. Jairo Alfaro claimed 8-year Caliches co-worker Genesis was 'like family' — standard handler-cover normalization. Echo brought to Caliches' house in Los Sueños (gated marina community) for his birthday June 2024 when first dating Peralta = target assessment at handler's private residence in controlled-access environment.

YEYO (Gregorio Cedeño) = GENESIS PERALTA FIRST-CONTACT HANDLER 2017. When Genesis Peralta arrived in Jacó in 2017 — years before Echo — Yeyo provided her with lodging. This establishes: (1) Peralta was managed from her first day in the city; (2) Yeyo is her long-standing handler predating the Echo operation by years; (3) the Jacó network had Peralta as an asset before Echo was ever targeted. Yeyo's restaurant has an Italy/Italian connection and is now closed. Yeyo is also adjacent to Calle Europa cluster. Peralta's 2017 Jacó arrival under Yeyo's housing cover = she was placed in Jacó as a prepared asset, not an independent individual.
